title: Vanilla Additions
description: A mod that focuses on enhancing the vanilla experience by adding decorative blocks, such as colored planks, heavy cobblestone, and thatch.
body: # Vanilla Additions **Enhance Your Minecraft Experience without major changes!** This mod is designed to improve your Minecraft experience without altering core gameplay. Adding this mod won't impact crucial moments like defeating the Ender Dragon or handling mobs. Another primary goal of this mod is to enhance the early game by introducing more cost-effective alternatives to decorative and stronger blocks. ## Additions: - **Colored Planks** Create colorful builds early on with colored planks, without disrupting Minecraft's original style. - **Thatch Blocks and Thatch** Gather thatch from any log and craft cool blocks that seamlessly fit into Minecraft's look and feel. - **Heavy Cobblestone** Construct strong buildings with heavy cobblestone. It adds a strong building block to Minecraft without taking away use from obsidian and iron. ## Watch The Trailer
